stemHtml: Which of the following alternatives is correct regarding audio- and visual signals in the cockpit when passing overhead an ILS middle marker?

options.a: Audio: 75 MHz, 2 dashes per second. Visual: blue light flashes.
options.b: Audio: 1300 Hz, alternating dots and dashes. Visual: amber light flashes.
options.c: Audio: 400 Hz, 2 dashes per second. Visual: blue light flashes.
options.d: Audio: 3000 Hz, alternating dots and dashes. Visual: amber light flashes.
